title: REHMANNIA
description: Rehmannia, primarily Rehmannia glutinosa, is a traditional Chinese herb that functions as a 'Yin' tonic to support adrenal, kidney, and bone health. It contains bioactives like catalpol and polysaccharides that exhibit significant antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and neuroprotective properties by modulating signaling pathways like AKT/mTOR and Wnt.

research.title: A Root-Based Combination Supplement Containing Pueraria lobata and Rehmannia glutinosa and Exercise Preserve Bone Mass in Ovariectomized Rats Fed a High-Fat Diet
research.summary: This study found that Rehmannia extracts combined with exercise significantly preserve bone microarchitecture and decrease bone loss markers in models of postmenopausal osteoporosis.

research.title: Review of the effects of the traditional Chinese medicine Rehmannia Six Formula on diabetes mellitus and its complications
research.summary: Research indicates that Rehmannia-based formulas have beneficial effects on blood glucose levels and help prevent diabetic complications like neuropathy and nephropathy.

research.title: Neuroprotective effects of Rehmannia glutinosa polysaccharide on chronic constant light-induced oxidative stress and autophagic cell death
research.summary: Polysaccharides from Rehmannia show anti-anxiety and cognitive protection effects by reducing hippocampal neuron damage and oxidative stress.

research.title: Rehmannia glutinosa exhibits anti-aging effect through maintaining the quiescence and decreasing the senescence of hematopoietic stem cells
research.summary: The herb demonstrated anti-aging properties by slowing the senescence of stem cells and maintaining their regenerative capacity over time.

research.title: Study of the Effect of Neutral Polysaccharides from Rehmannia glutinosa on Lifespan of Caenorhabditis elegans
research.summary: Polysaccharide fractions from Rehmannia were shown to extend lifespan and delay senescence by activating antioxidant enzymatic systems.

sentiment.summary: Users generally view Rehmannia as a potent 'kidney tonic' and anxiolytic, often reporting improved hormone balance and stress resilience, though it is frequently taken in herbal blends rather than in isolation.

effects.label: Bone Health:
effects.description: Highly effective in animal models for preventing bone mineral density loss during menopause.

effects.label: Anti-Aging:
effects.description: Validated through multiple studies showing lifespan extension in simple organisms and stem cell protection in mammals.

effects.label: Preparation Matters:
effects.description: The effects of 'Prepared' (steamed) Rehmannia differ from 'Raw' Rehmannia, particularly regarding its impact on digestion and glucose metabolism.

effects.label: Synergistic Potential:
effects.description: Effectiveness is often enhanced when paired with other herbs like Ginseng (Liangyi paste) or Pueraria lobata.

dosage.label: Standardized Extracts:
dosage.description: Clinical animal models often utilize doses between 100mg/kg to 400mg/kg body weight.

dosage.label: Root Powder:
dosage.description: Common carp studies used a 4% prepared root powder concentration in diet for microbiota benefits.

dosage.label: Traditional Formulations:
dosage.description: Often consumed as part of the 'Rehmannia Six Formula' (Liuwei Dihuang Wan) rather than a standalone extract.

dosage.label: Hairy Root Cultures:
dosage.description: Laboratory production focuses on optimizing catalpol content, which can reach up to 0.7% dry weight.

sideEffects.label: Digestive Sensitivity:
sideEffects.description: Crude or raw forms can sometimes cause loose stools or digestive upset if not properly prepared.

sideEffects.label: Sedation:
sideEffects.description: While beneficial for anxiety, some users report excessive tiredness when taken during the day.

sideEffects.label: Hypoglycemia Risk:
sideEffects.description: Due to its blood-sugar-lowering effects, it may interact with diabetic medications.

sideEffects.label: Microbiome Shifts:
sideEffects.description: Long-term use can significantly alter intestinal flora, potentially increasing beneficial Firmicutes.

availability.label: Herbal Sourcing:
availability.description: Widely available in traditional Chinese pharmacies as either 'Sheng Di Huang' (Raw) or 'Shu Di Huang' (Prepared).

availability.label: Supplement Formats:
availability.description: Commonly found in 'Kidney Support' or 'Adrenal Support' capsules and complex liquid tinctures.
